yap zone

i’m catching up lesgoo, hope this is good, it was in my element so i did my best with words (they’re still hard). YOU BETTER COMFORT HIM. also if there are any mistakes or i missed something, please let me know

i’m a hypocrite but, to my fellow trans guys and gals n all, believe me when i say you are perfect the way you are. don’t let any random wanker come and say otherwise, wear your scars proud—whether mental, emotional, or even physical. you are who you wish to be, boy, girl, anything. i believe in you and so do so many others like you. i know personally how hard it is to deal with the harsher side of what comes with being trans, i’m trying my best to fight through it and move on to a physical change in the future. i encourage those who seek the same to do so too, keep going, i support and believe in you.
